title: SSRF Defense, Prototype-Safe Data, Terminal Injection, Paths, and Resource Limits · Inference Brief: Pokedex Ts Terminal Text Safety
summary: Redirects escape the fixed host, parsed objects are merged into state, remote text contains ANSI or bidi controls, save paths are arbitrary, and response or command sizes are unbounded. Predict the user decision, runtime value, strict type claim, promise state, API boundary, failure, and observable evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the pokedex ts terminal text safety increment in deny-by-default TypeScript trust-boundary policy. Learners progress thr…
objectives: Normalize or visibly escape control, ANSI, bidi, and non-printing sequences from commands, API payloads, and files.
Use own-property checks, explicit field construction, safe records, and no blind assignment from unknown objects.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
